impact: Advances the active PP&D task by defining a source-backed fixture that compares known residential permit user-case inventory against process requirements and enumerates only missing facts, files, acknowledgments, and decisions.
summary: Adds a deterministic residential permit missing-information detector fixture.
target_task: Task checkbox-58: Add a missing-information detector fixture that compares a residential permit user-case fact inventory against the residential permit process requirements and returns only missing facts, files, acknowledgments, and decisions.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
